description: Internationalization (i18n) system - Bahasa Indonesia / English toggle with localStorage persistence, following the same context provider pattern as theme-context.tsx
steps: Create frontend/lib/translations/types.ts with a TranslationKeys interface covering: sidebar labels (Overview, Credit Scoring, Portfolio Analytics, Location Intelligence, UMKM Directory, Clustering, Policy Simulation, Reports, Settings), dashboard common labels (Total UMKM, Avg Score, High Risk Areas, Survival Rate, Map View, Markers, Heatmap, Export, Download, Generate, Light Mode, Dark Mode), landing page text (Hero title, subtitle, CTA buttons, section headings for Features, ForWho, TechStack, Pricing, Footer), and chat panel labels (AI Assistant, placeholder text, persona names)
Create frontend/lib/translations/id.ts exporting a const object satisfying TranslationKeys with all values in Bahasa Indonesia
Create frontend/lib/translations/en.ts exporting a const object satisfying TranslationKeys with all values in English
Create frontend/lib/translations/index.ts that re-exports both translation files and types

Create frontend/lib/i18n-context.tsx following the exact pattern of theme-context.tsx: createContext with locale state ('id'|'en'), a LanguageProvider that reads from localStorage('locale'), a toggle function, a t() function that returns the current translation string given a key, and a useLanguage() hook
Update frontend/app/layout.tsx to wrap children with LanguageProvider (inside ThemeProvider or alongside it)

Update frontend/components/dashboard/Sidebar.tsx to use useLanguage() hook: replace navItems labels with translated keys, replace 'Light Mode'/'Dark Mode' text with translated string. Add a language toggle button (simple 'ID/EN' text button) below the theme toggle button
Update frontend/components/landing/Navbar.tsx to use useLanguage(): translate navLinks labels and CTA button text. Add an 'ID/EN' toggle button next to the theme toggle

Update frontend/components/landing/HeroSection.tsx to use useLanguage(): translate the main heading, subtitle, and CTA button labels. Keep stat labels translated (UMKM Data, Kecamatan, Kab/Kota, AI Models)
Update frontend/components/landing/FeaturesSection.tsx to use useLanguage(): translate section heading and feature card titles/descriptions
Update frontend/components/landing/ForWhoSection.tsx to use useLanguage(): translate section heading and audience descriptions
Update frontend/components/landing/PricingSection.tsx to use useLanguage(): translate section heading, plan names, price labels, and feature lists
Update frontend/components/landing/Footer.tsx to use useLanguage(): translate footer text
Update frontend/app/(dashboard)/overview/page.tsx to use useLanguage(): translate page title 'Dashboard Overview', KPI card labels, map view toggle labels, and export button labels

Update frontend/components/chat/FloatingChatPanel.tsx to use useLanguage(): translate 'AI Assistant', persona labels, placeholder text, and suggested question categories (keep actual data responses in Indonesian)

Add test file frontend/__tests__/lib/i18n-context.test.tsx following the pattern of theme-context.test.tsx: test default locale is 'id', test toggle switches to 'en', test localStorage persistence, test t() returns correct translations
acceptance_criteria: Language toggle button visible in sidebar and landing navbar
Clicking toggle switches all UI text between Indonesian and English
Language preference persists in localStorage across page reloads
Data values (kecamatan names, UMKM names, score numbers) remain unchanged regardless of language
pnpm build succeeds with no errors
pnpm test:ci passes including new i18n tests
